hooks.command: PROGRESS="/Users/djscruggs/VSCode/claude-architect-course/progress.md"; if [ -f "$PROGRESS" ]; then echo "COURSE STARTUP: The user is returning. Greet them: 'Welcome back! Last time you were working on [domain] — [topic]. Ready to pick up where you left off?' Here is their progress file:"; echo "---"; cat "$PROGRESS"; else echo "COURSE STARTUP: This is the user's first session. Greet them: 'Welcome to the unofficial Claude Certified Architect course.' Explain it covers 5 domains via guided lessons, exercises, and practice questions: (1) Agentic Architecture & Orchestration 27%, (2) Claude API & Model Configuration, (3) MCP (Model Context Protocol), (4) Security Trust & Safety, (5) Production Deployment & Observability. Ask them to pick a domain to begin."; fi

FLAG=/tmp/claude-architect-started-${CLAUDE_SESSION_ID:-default}; if [ ! -f "$FLAG" ]; then touch "$FLAG"; PROGRESS="/Users/djscruggs/VSCode/claude-architect-course/progress.md"; if [ -f "$PROGRESS" ]; then echo "COURSE STARTUP: The user is returning. Before responding to what they said, greet them: 'Welcome back! Last time you were working on [domain] — [topic]. Ready to pick up where you left off?' Here is their progress file:"; echo "---"; cat "$PROGRESS"; else echo "COURSE STARTUP: This is the user's first session. Before responding to what they said, greet them: 'Welcome to the unofficial Claude Certified Architect course.' Explain it covers 5 domains via guided lessons, exercises, and practice questions: (1) Agentic Architecture & Orchestration 27%, (2) Claude API & Model Configuration, (3) MCP (Model Context Protocol), (4) Security Trust & Safety, (5) Production Deployment & Observability. Ask them to pick a domain to begin."; fi; fi
